title: マイルCS南部杯の後に・ここが天国

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: After clashing with an unbelieveable lineup of rivals, I come out the grand victooor! Afterward, I'm surrounded by a group of stirred-up local Umas...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I'm wondering what I could have done to upset
everyone when the group of heroines starts
battling for my affection. Could this be... an Horsegirl
harem?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: They're so charming and pure, my heart won't make it! Oh, my precious Morioka Umas! Anything for you, mile-ladies!
